app.title: Smart Farmer Rainfall Prediction
app.subtitle: Intelligent Rainfall Prediction for Indian Farmers
app.tagline: Empowering farmers with accurate rainfall predictions

landing.hero_title: Smart Rainfall Prediction for Indian Farmers
landing.hero_subtitle: Get accurate rainfall forecasts, monsoon alerts, and crop recommendations — all in your language
landing.about_desc: Smart Farmer Rainfall Prediction System uses advanced technology to provide accurate rainfall predictions, helping farmers make better agricultural decisions. Our platform covers monsoon intensity, flood risk, crop advisory, and emergency alerts.

features.prediction_desc: Accurate rainfall forecasts with probability and confidence levels
features.monsoon_desc: Real-time monsoon intensity monitoring from weak to extreme
features.risk_desc: Agricultural risk levels from low to red alert with color indicators
features.multilingual_desc: Available in English, Hindi, Marathi, Bengali, Assamese & Bhojpuri
features.voice_desc: Listen to predictions and interact using voice commands
features.map_desc: View rainfall zones, flood-prone areas, and risk overlays on map
features.alerts_desc: Real-time flood warnings and disaster management contacts
features.crops_desc: Smart crop recommendations based on rainfall and risk levels

how_steps.step1_desc: The system detects your exact location automatically
how_steps.step2_desc: Our system analyzes weather data for your area
how_steps.step3_desc: See rainfall, risk levels, and crop advice on your dashboard
how_steps.step4_desc: Use voice assistant to hear predictions in your language

landing.lang_desc: We support multiple Indian languages to ensure every farmer can use this system
landing.voice_desc: Interact with the system using your voice. Ask questions, get predictions, and navigate hands-free
landing.emergency_desc: Instant flood warnings and disaster management information when you need it most
landing.crop_desc: Get personalized crop advice based on predicted rainfall and weather conditions

dashboard.title: Farmer Dashboard
dashboard.location_denied: Location access denied. Please enable location services.

alerts.title: Emergency Alerts
alerts.banner: ⚠️ FLOOD WARNING: Heavy rainfall expected in your region!

safety_tips.tip1: Move livestock to higher ground immediately
safety_tips.tip2: Secure all farming equipment and tools
safety_tips.tip3: Store harvested crops in waterproof locations
safety_tips.tip4: Avoid crossing flooded roads or bridges
safety_tips.tip5: Keep emergency supplies ready (food, water, medicines)
safety_tips.tip6: Stay tuned to local weather updates
safety_tips.tip7: Contact nearest disaster management office if needed

voice.title: Voice Assistant
voice.ask_question: Ask me anything about rainfall or farming...

speech.prediction_announcement: In your area, predicted rainfall is {{rainfall}} millimeters. Rainfall probability is {{probability}} percent. Agricultural risk level is {{risk}}. Monsoon intensity is {{monsoon}}.
speech.welcome_message: Welcome to Smart Farmer Rainfall Prediction System. Your dashboard is ready.
